title: BarCraft Wine Decanter, Wine Aeration Glass, Wide-Base Design, 1.5 Litre
features: What You'll Get - Elegant BarCraft wide-based glass decanter, for decanting and aerating red wine, white wine and port
Unlock Your Wine's Potential - Improve the taste of wine and serve in style with this elegant, handmade wdecanter
Easy to Handle - The slender, tapered neck reduces spills while decanting, swilling and pouring
Ideal for Most Wines - Calm down boisterous Bordeaux and wake up young merlots or develop white wines and ports
Guaranteed Gift Boxed Quality - Treat yourself or give the ultimate wine lover’s gift. This product has a 12 month guarantee
description: From the manufacturer BarCraft Aerating Glass Wine Carafe Decant, improve and pour wines in true style. The epitome of elegance and sophistication, this stunning wine carafe allows you to enjoy restaurant-quality wine drinking from the comfort of your very own home. Handmade, each individually crafted glass decanter features a narrow neck with a beautifully sloped top, which blooms into a wide, curved base. Not only does this look exceptional when showcased on your dinner table or cabinet, these simple features allow the decanting carafe to unearth smells and flavours previously hidden within the wine’s structure – leading to smoother, more complex wines. Treat yourself to this decanter and turn even everyday wines into a new flavour experience. Or why not gift it to a wine-loving friend? They are sure to appreciate the artful elegance of its design, as well the joy of discovering their favourite red wines all over again. Capacity: 1.5 litres (2½ pints) Made by hand Gift-boxed Hand-wash only Improve the Taste, and Serve in Style By design, this glass decanting carafe promises superior wine preparation, while being very simple to use. Gripping the aerator’s neck and swirling it gently mimics the swilling motion previously done glass by glass, allowing you to trigger the aromas in the full bottle at once. Not only will it please the passionate host to look so professional, aerating your wine has two main benefits. Oxidation triggers aromatic compounds, unlocking your wine layer by exquisite layer – particularly good for energising young or delicate wines. It also smooths out strong undertones (such as tannins), making it fantastic for calming down boisterous bordeaux and barolos, as well as ports. With a closed bowl and slim neck to improve pouring precision, as well as prevent spills whilst decanting, swilling and serving, this is the essential upgrade to your wine service you’ll never be able to live without. Restaurant-Quality Assets Suitable for all wine types Whether you fancy yourself a wine aficionado with a taste for Grand Cru reds, or simply enjoy the supermarket selection, most red, white and fortified wines undeniably benefit from a little time spent developing – and will display taste differences even complete beginners can enjoy. Designed for a full bottle In order to achieve maximum bouquet development, the glass carafe’s 1.5-litre (2½-pint) capacity accommodates an entire bottle up to the halfway point of the bowl, allowing for maximum contact between the wine and available breathing space. The perfect gift Each large decanting carafe is handmade from glass and sold gift-boxed, making it a truly stunning gift for someone who appreciates wine, or the passionate host looking for an enviable feature piece for their next dinner party. If you can bear to part with it, that is… Easy cleaning No wine or port decanter is complete without cleaning beads. For lifting the most stubborn stains from the hard-to-reach areas, rely on BarCraft’s pack of decanter cleaning balls (search BCCSDECBALLS). They also help clean vases and cruets, making them fantastic stocking fillers! More from BarCraft BarCraft is KitchenCraft's barware brand. This stylish, innovative collection is made up of dozens of tools and accessories - enough to satisfy all drinking preferences and occasions. With everything from shakers to strainers, muddlers to jiggers, it's easy to craft the perfect concoction for a glamorous cocktail evening. Or why not savour the sophisticated notes of a vintage wine with BarCraft's aerators, filters and chillers? Whatever your tipple of choice, BarCraft helps you enjoy every moment.
